name: io.github.zerx-lab/fluxdown
title: FluxDown
description: Control the FluxDown download manager: add, list, pause, resume, remove downloads and queues.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <admin token>. Enable the MCP endpoint in FluxDown settings (local_server_mcp_enabled) and copy the admin token; on the headless server it is printed once in the container log at first launch.
